creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
My attempts to print to laserjet, print to PDF, or export to PDF all produce blank pages.  Exporting to PNG works fine.

Running libreoffice from a terminal doesn't produce much output, but here it is:

FreeBSD coral.acadix  bacon ~ 1003: libreoffice
MESA-LOADER: failed to retrieve device information
QKqueueFileSystemWatcherEngine::addPaths: open: No such file or directory

Everything installed via latest packages

FreeBSD coral.acadix.biz 12.1-RELEASE-p6 FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE-p6 GENERIC  amd64
